name: @mpgd/app-game-services-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker starter for mpgd game services.

scripts.test: cd ../.. && node tools/run-ttsx.mjs --project apps/game-services-worker/tsconfig.json apps/game-services-worker/src/index.test.ts && node tools/run-ttsx.mjs --project apps/game-services-worker/tsconfig.json apps/game-services-worker/src/d1Store.test.ts && node tools/run-ttsx.mjs --project apps/game-services-worker/tsconfig.json apps/game-services-worker/src/verifiedLeaderboardD1.test.ts
